coverage_note: The bundled TTR population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from TTR transthyretin tetramer stability, amyloid fibril formation, neuropathy/cardiomyopathy context, and protein-stabilizer therapy biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000118271: TTR coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: TTR findings should be read against transthyretin tetramer stability, amyloid fibril formation, neuropathy/cardiomyopathy context, and protein-stabilizer therapy biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

TTR Val50Met / V30M model is curated as a TTR marker for Hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis context, Amyloid cardiomyopathy and neuropathy biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

TTR tetramer-destabilization model is curated as a TTR marker for Hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis context, Amyloid cardiomyopathy and neuropathy biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
